versions.version_description: Fixed missing chord highlight that was missing and cleaned up headers.
This version uses a capo on the 4th fret in order to play the hook similarly to the original.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Transpose -1 with button at the left for original key.  Or... transpose -2 and capo at first fret.

[Intro]  ( [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] ) x4


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
City's breaking down on a camel's back, they just have to go 'cause they don't know wack[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]
So all you fill the streets it's appealing to see[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                                    [ch]Em[/ch]
You won't get out the county, 'cos you're bad and free[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
You've got a new horizon, it's ephemeral style, a melancholy town where we never smile[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
And all I wanna hear is the message beep[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                                    [ch]Em[/ch]
My dreams, they've got to kiss, because I don't get sleep, no[/tab]


[Hook]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Windmill, windmill for the land, turn forever hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Take it all there on your stride, it is sinking, falling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Love forever love is free let's turn forever you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Windmill, windmill for the land is everybody in?[/tab]


[Verse 2: De La Soul]

[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Laughing gas these hazmats, fast cats, lining them up-a like ass cracks[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
Lay these ponies at the track, it's my chocolate attack[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Shit, I'm stepping in the heart of this here, Carebear reppin' it harder this year[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Watch me as I gravitate, hahahahahahaa[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Yo, we gonna go ghost town, this motown, with yo sound, you're in the blink[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                                       [ch]Em[/ch]
You gonna bite the dust, can't fight with us, with yo sound you kill the inc.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
So don't stop, get it, get it, until you jet ahead[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]           ( [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] ) x2  ( [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] ) x3
Yo, watch the way I navigate, hahahahahhaa[/tab]


[Hook]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Windmill, windmill for the land, turn forever hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Take it all there on your stride, it is sinking, falling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Love forever love is free let's turn forever you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Windmill, windmill for the land is everybody in?[/tab]


[Outro: De La Soul]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't stop, shit it,get it, we are your captains in it, steady, watch me navigate, ahahahahahhaa[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't stop, shit it,get it, we are your captains in it, steady, watch me navigate, ahahahahahhaa[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
      Feel good       feel good     feel good       feel good, hahaha[/tab]
